name: Lasithi

family.reason: Family-friendly resorts in Elounda and Agios Nikolaos.

couples.reason: Secluded luxury and romantic bay views.

luxury.reason: Some of the finest resort hotels in the Mediterranean.

budget.reason: Elounda is expensive; budget options in Sitia and Ierapetra.

nightlife.reason: Quiet evenings; this is not a party region.

food.reason: Sitia olive oil, Liatiko wine, and traditional Cretan tavernas.

quick_summary: Lasithi is the easternmost region of Crete — home to Spinalonga Island, Vai Palm Forest, Elounda Bay, and the unperformed pace of traditional Cretan villages.
